{{Relic Infobox|Pael's Eye|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Exhaust|2}}
{{R|Pael's Eye||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. The first time each combat you end your turn without playing cards, it {{KW|Exhaust|Exhausts|2}} your Hand and gives you an extra turn.

== Obtaining Pael's Eye ==
Can be offered at the start of {{2|Acts#Act 2|Act 2}} by {{KW|Pael||2}}.

== Interactions ==
=== Order ===
* {{R|Pael's Eye||2}} will {{KW|Exhaust||2}} your Hand before {{C|Stampede||2}} can play any {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks|2}}.
** However, {{C|Dark Embrace||2}} can draw {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks|2}} in time for {{C|Stampede||2}} to play them.

=== Synergies ===
* Any start of turn and end of turn effects, such as {{R|Mercury Hourglass||2}} and {{C|Consuming Shadow||2}}, will trigger on the turn you trigger {{R|Pael's Eye||2}} as well as the extra turn it gives you.
* Triggering {{R|Pael's Eye||2}} will always trigger {{R|Diamond Diadem||2}} as well, and the {{BD|Diamond Diadem||2}} buff will persist until the next ''enemy'' turn ends, meaning that you can halve the enemy's damage even after taking the extra turn from {{R|Pael's Eye||2}} with no restrictions.

=== Neutral ===
* Triggering {{R|Pael's Eye||2}} will advance the turn counter, so it can allow you to trigger {{2|Relics}} like {{R|Horn Cleat||2}} and {{R|Chandelier||2}} earlier than would normally be possible. However, it can also waste their effects as {{KW|Block||2}} and {{KW|Energy||2}} do not usually persist between turns.

=== Anti-Synergies ===
* Triggering {{R|Pael's Eye||2}} will {{KW|Exhaust||2}} any {{KW|Retain|Retained|2}} cards you may have wanted to keep.

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Pael's Eye to the game.
